compiled_state.title: As a project maintainer, I can rely on the CI llm-review job dispatching the full deep-tier multi-agent review for high-complexity PRs
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Extend ci-llm-review-runner.sh to dispatch the deep tier when the classifier selects it — 3 parallel sonnet specialists (correctness, verification, hygiene) plus 1 opus arch synthesis call (4 LLM calls total).

**Why**: Deep tier is required for high-blast-radius PRs to match local /dso:review's deep-tier behavior. Without this story, deep-classified PRs would silently fall back to standard tier, defeating parity.

**Scope**:
- IN: deep-tier branch in runner; 3-parallel claude-code-action dispatch; opus arch synthesis after sonnet specialists complete; merge mechanism for parallel findings into a single reviewer-findings.json with arch agent as sole final writer.
- OUT: overlay agents (Story 3); rate-limit handling (handled by built-in retry of claude-code-action plus the consideration noted below).

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, when the classifier selects deep tier, the runner dispatches 3 parallel sonnet specialists (correctness, verification, hygiene) followed by 1 opus arch synthesis call.
  ← Satisfies: "Deep tier dispatches 3 parallel sonnet specialists + 1 opus arch synthesis (4 LLM calls)"
- When this story is complete, reviewer-findings.json contains entries from all 4 deep-tier agents, with the opus arch agent as the sole final writer (single-writer invariant preserved per CLAUDE.md rule 8).
  ← Satisfies: "evidenced by reviewer-findings.json containing entries from all four agents"
- unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Performance] 4 parallel claude-code-action calls may exceed Anthropic per-key rate limits; rely on claude-code-action's built-in retry/backoff and document the divergence from local agent-batch-lifecycle's usage-aware throttling (CI does not consult check-usage.sh; CI is exempt from local rate-aware throttling — document this as intentional in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md).
- [Implicit-shared-state] Single-writer invariant: 3 parallel sonnet specialists writing concurrently to the same reviewer-findings.json will race. Implement specialist outputs to per-agent slot files (reviewer-findings-{a,b,c}.json), then have the opus arch agent merge them into the canonical reviewer-findings.json — matching the local deep-tier protocol.
- [Reliability] If any specialist fails (timeout, malformed output), the arch agent must detect missing slot files and fail-closed rather than synthesize from incomplete inputs.

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
